creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Sun, Aug 13, 2000 at 08:36:31PM -0700, Eric Anholt wrote:
> 	Tuxracer is a 3d penguin racing game using OpenGL.  It's my 
> first port/send-pr, so I hope I've done it right.

Next time be sure not to paste your shar straight into the email/send-pr
because that will ruin some of the spacing etc.  Other than that you did
just fine.  :)

> X-TCL_LIB_NAME=tcl
> X+TCL_LIB_NAME=tcl82

My only problem with this is that it doesn't allow people to use it with
other Tcl ports.  So it is a Bad Thing (tm).

-- 
Will Andrews <will@physics.purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
